question: How do I create an account?
answer: Visit our website at app.acmesaas.com and click 'Sign Up'. Enter your email address, create a strong password, and verify your email address by clicking the link sent to your inbox. Your account will be active within minutes.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. Enter your registered email address and we will send you a password reset link. The link expires in 24 hours. If you do not receive the email, check your spam folder or contact support@acmesaas.com.

question: How do I change my email address?
answer: Go to Settings → Profile → Contact Information. Enter your new email address and click 'Update'. A verification email will be sent to the new address. You must verify it before the change takes effect.

question: Can I have multiple users on one account?
answer: Yes. Navigate to Settings → Team Members and click 'Invite User'. You can invite unlimited users on the Business plan and up to 5 users on the Starter plan. Each user gets their own login credentials.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: Go to Settings → Account → Danger Zone and click 'Delete Account'. You will be asked to confirm by typing your account name. Note: all your data will be permanently deleted after 30 days.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication (2FA)?
answer: Go to Settings → Security → Two-Factor Authentication and click 'Enable 2FA'. Download an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy, scan the QR code, and enter the 6-digit code to confirm. 2FA will be required on every login.

question: Can I change my username?
answer: Your username is generated from your email address and cannot be changed manually. If you need a different username, you can change your display name under Settings → Profile → Display Name.

question: How do I update my profile picture?
answer: Go to Settings → Profile → Avatar. Click 'Upload Image', choose a JPG or PNG file under 5 MB, and click 'Save'. Your new picture will appear across all parts of the application.

question: What happens if I forget my 2FA device?
answer: If you lose access to your 2FA device, use one of the backup codes you received when you enabled 2FA. Go to the login page, click 'Use backup code', and enter a backup code. Contact support@acmesaas.com if you have lost all backup codes.

question: How do I log out of all sessions?
answer: Go to Settings → Security → Active Sessions and click 'Log Out All Devices'. This will terminate all active sessions except the current one. Use this if you suspect unauthorized access.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), as well as PayPal and bank transfers for annual plans. All payments are processed securely via Stripe.

question: How do I upgrade my plan?
answer: Go to Settings → Billing → Plans and click 'Upgrade'. Select the plan you want and confirm payment. The upgrade takes effect immediately and you will be charged a prorated amount for the remainder of the current billing cycle.

question: Can I downgrade my plan?
answer: Yes. Go to Settings → Billing → Plans and select a lower tier. The downgrade takes effect at the end of your current billing period. Any features not included in the lower plan will be disabled at that point.

question: Do you offer a free trial?
answer: Yes, all plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card is required to start a trial. At the end of the trial you can choose a plan or your account will revert to the free tier.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Settings → Billing → Subscription and click 'Cancel Subscription'. Your subscription will remain active until the end of the current billing period. You will not be charged again after cancellation.

question: Where can I find my invoices?
answer: Go to Settings → Billing → Invoices. All past invoices are listed there. Click any invoice to download a PDF copy. Invoices are also emailed to the billing contact on file.

question: Do you offer discounts for annual billing?
answer: Yes, annual billing offers a 20% discount compared to monthly billing. Switch to annual billing in Settings → Billing → Plans. You will be charged for a full year upfront.

question: What happens if my payment fails?
answer: If a payment fails, we will retry the charge 3 times over 7 days. You will receive email notifications each time. If the payment is not resolved within 7 days, your account will be suspended until the balance is settled.

question: Do you offer nonprofit or educational discounts?
answer: Yes, we offer a 30% discount for registered nonprofits and accredited educational institutions. Email discount@acmesaas.com with proof of your organization's status to apply.

question: Can I get a refund?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for new subscriptions. Contact billing@acmesaas.com within 30 days of your first charge and we will process a full refund. Refunds for subsequent billing cycles are reviewed case by case.

question: What browsers are supported?
answer: We support the latest two versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Internet Explorer is not supported. We recommend Chrome for the best experience.

question: Is there a mobile app?
answer: Yes, we have iOS and Android apps available on the App Store and Google Play Store. The mobile app supports all core features. Search for 'AcmeSaaS' in your device's app store.

question: What is the maximum file upload size?
answer: The maximum file upload size is 100 MB for Starter plan users and 1 GB for Business plan users. For files larger than 1 GB, contact support to discuss custom options.

question: How do I export my data?
answer: Go to Settings → Data → Export. Choose the format (CSV, JSON, or Excel) and the date range. Click 'Export'. A download link will be emailed to you within 15 minutes. Exports are retained for 48 hours.

question: What is your system uptime SLA?
answer: We guarantee 99.9% uptime for all paid plans. Our status page is available at status.acmesaas.com. Business plan customers receive uptime guarantees of 99.99% with dedicated support.

question: How do I report a bug?
answer: Use the in-app feedback button (bottom-right corner) or email bugs@acmesaas.com. Please include a description of the issue, steps to reproduce, your browser version, and any screenshots. We triage all bug reports within 1 business day.

question: What happens during scheduled maintenance?
answer: Scheduled maintenance is performed Sundays between 02:00–04:00 UTC. We notify users 48 hours in advance via email and status.acmesaas.com. During maintenance, the app may be read-only or unavailable for up to 30 minutes.

question: How do I check service status?
answer: Visit status.acmesaas.com for real-time status of all platform components. You can subscribe to status updates via email or RSS. Incident history is also available on that page.

question: Does AcmeSaaS have an API?
answer: Yes, AcmeSaaS offers a REST API available on Business plans and above. API documentation is at docs.acmesaas.com/api. You can generate API keys in Settings → Developer → API Keys.

question: How do I generate an API key?
answer: Go to Settings → Developer → API Keys and click 'Create New Key'. Give the key a descriptive name, set the permission scope, and click 'Generate'. Copy the key immediately as it will only be shown once.

question: Does AcmeSaaS integrate with Slack?
answer: Yes. Go to Settings → Integrations → Slack and click 'Connect'. Authorize AcmeSaaS in Slack's OAuth flow. Once connected, you can receive notifications and run commands directly from Slack.

question: How do I connect Google Workspace?
answer: Go to Settings → Integrations → Google Workspace. Click 'Connect with Google' and authorize access. This enables Google SSO, Google Drive file imports, and Google Calendar sync.

question: Is there a Zapier integration?
answer: Yes. Search for 'AcmeSaaS' in Zapier to find our official integration. You can trigger Zaps on events like new records, updated statuses, or completed workflows. An API key is required under Settings → Developer → API Keys.

question: Can AcmeSaaS connect to Salesforce?
answer: Yes, on Business plan and above. Go to Settings → Integrations → Salesforce and follow the OAuth setup wizard. Contacts, leads, and opportunities can be synced bi-directionally.

question: Does AcmeSaaS support webhooks?
answer: Yes. Go to Settings → Developer → Webhooks and click 'Add Webhook'. Enter your endpoint URL, select the event types you want to subscribe to, and save. Webhooks are delivered with a HMAC-SHA256 signature for verification.

question: Can I use AcmeSaaS with HubSpot?
answer: Yes. Go to Settings → Integrations → HubSpot. Connect via OAuth. You can sync contacts, deals, and email activity between both platforms. Sync runs every 15 minutes.

question: How do I import data from another tool?
answer: Go to Settings → Data → Import. We support CSV and JSON imports. Download the import template, populate it with your data, and upload the file. A preview will be shown before the import is committed.

question: Is there an official Microsoft Teams integration?
answer: Yes. Go to Settings → Integrations → Microsoft Teams and click 'Add to Teams'. Install the AcmeSaaS app from the Microsoft AppSource. You can receive alerts and query records directly from Teams.

question: Does AcmeSaaS support SAML SSO?
answer: Yes, SAML 2.0 SSO is supported on Enterprise plans. Contact your account manager or email enterprise@acmesaas.com to set it up. We support Okta, Azure AD, and other standard SAML identity providers.

question: Can I integrate AcmeSaaS with my own database?
answer: Via our REST API you can read and write records programmatically. For complex bi-directional sync, use our webhook + API combination. Direct database access is not available for security reasons.

question: Is my data encrypted?
answer: All data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3. Backups are also encrypted. Encryption keys are managed through AWS KMS and rotated annually.

question: Where is my data stored?
answer: Data is stored in AWS data centers in the United States (us-east-1 and us-west-2) by default. Enterprise customers can choose EU (eu-west-1) or APAC (ap-southeast-1) regions. Data is replicated across two availability zones.

question: Is AcmeSaaS SOC 2 compliant?
answer: Yes. AcmeSaaS is SOC 2 Type II certified. Our latest report is available to Enterprise customers under NDA. Contact compliance@acmesaas.com to request a copy.

question: How do you handle data breaches?
answer: In the event of a confirmed data breach, we will notify affected customers within 72 hours as required by GDPR. We will provide details of what data was affected and steps taken to remediate.

question: Can I restrict login to specific IP addresses?
answer: Yes, on Business and Enterprise plans. Go to Settings → Security → IP Allowlist and add the IP ranges you want to permit. All other IP addresses will be blocked from logging in.

question: Does AcmeSaaS comply with GDPR?
answer: Yes. AcmeSaaS is fully GDPR compliant. You can request data export or deletion at any time via Settings → Privacy. We also offer a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) available at legal.acmesaas.com.

question: How often do you perform security audits?
answer: We conduct internal security reviews quarterly and engage a third-party penetration testing firm annually. Our bug bounty program is available at security.acmesaas.com for responsible disclosure.

question: Can I set a session timeout policy?
answer: Yes. Go to Settings → Security → Session Policy. You can set idle session timeout (minimum 15 minutes, maximum 24 hours) and enforce re-authentication for sensitive actions.

question: Is AcmeSaaS HIPAA compliant?
answer: AcmeSaaS can be configured for HIPAA compliance on Enterprise plans with a signed Business Associate Agreement (BAA). Contact enterprise@acmesaas.com to discuss HIPAA-compliant configurations.

question: How do I report a security vulnerability?
answer: Please report security vulnerabilities through our responsible disclosure program at security.acmesaas.com or email security@acmesaas.com with subject 'Vulnerability Report'. Do not use the public bug tracker for security issues.
